'''鈭歮-sh-y-w''' ('''kamashyewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chattermark|chattermark]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-y-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chattermark|chattermark]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-sh-y-w
|-
! Lemma
| kamashyewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimashyewoko|thimashyewoko]] || [[word:jimashyewoko|jimashyewoko]] || [[word:shimashyewoko|shimashyewoko]] || [[word:kimashyewoko|kimashyewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumashyewoko|thuthumashyewoko]] || [[word:jujumashyewoko|jujumashyewoko]] || [[word:shushumashyewoko|shushumashyewoko]] || [[word:kukumashyewoko|kukumashyewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumashyewoko|thumashyewoko]] || [[word:jumashyewoko|jumashyewoko]] || [[word:shumashyewoko|shumashyewoko]] || [[word:kumashyewoko|kumashyewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumashyewoko|thumashyewoko]] || [[word:jumashyewoko|jumashyewoko]] || [[word:shumashyewoko|shumashyewoko]] || [[word:kumashyewoko|kumashyewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themashyewoko|themashyewoko]] || [[word:jemashyewoko|jemashyewoko]] || [[word:shemashyewoko|shemashyewoko]] || [[word:kemashyewoko|kemashyewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomashyewoko|thothomashyewoko]] || [[word:jojomashyewoko|jojomashyewoko]] || [[word:shoshomashyewoko|shoshomashyewoko]] || [[word:kokomashyewoko|kokomashyewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomashyewoko|thomashyewoko]] || [[word:jomashyewoko|jomashyewoko]] || [[word:shomashyewoko|shomashyewoko]] || [[word:komashyewoko|komashyewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomashyewoko|thomashyewoko]] || [[word:jomashyewoko|jomashyewoko]] || [[word:shomashyewoko|shomashyewoko]] || [[word:komashyewoko|komashyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mashyewoko|th忙mashyewoko]] || [[word:j忙mashyewoko|j忙mashyewoko]] || [[word:sh忙mashyewoko|sh忙mashyewoko]] || [[word:k忙mashyewoko|k忙mashyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamashyewoko|thathamashyewoko]] || [[word:jajamashyewoko|jajamashyewoko]] || [[word:shashamashyewoko|shashamashyewoko]] || [[word:kakamashyewoko|kakamashyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamashyewoko|thamashyewoko]] || [[word:jamashyewoko|jamashyewoko]] || [[word:shamashyewoko|shamashyewoko]] || [[word:kamashyewoko|kamashyewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamashyewoko|thamashyewoko]] || [[word:jamashyewoko|jamashyewoko]] || [[word:shamashyewoko|shamashyewoko]] || [[word:kamashyewoko|kamashyewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shamashyewithi|shamashyewithi]] || [[word:shamashyewiji|shamashyewiji]] || [[word:shamashyewishi|shamashyewishi]] || [[word:shamashyewiki|shamashyewiki]]
